# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:gov_crown_colony_india = {
	transfer_of_power = dictatorial
	new_leader_on_reform_government = no

	male_ruler = "RULER_TITLE_VICEROY"
	female_ruler = "RULER_TITLE_VICEROY"

	possible = {
		has_law = law_type:law_colonial_administration
		exists = c:GBR
		is_subject_of = c:GBR
		c:GBR ?= {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		is_subject_type = subject_type_colony
		is_country_type = colonial
		c:BIC ?= this
	}

	on_government_type_change = {
		change_to_dictatorial = yes
	}
	on_post_government_type_change = {
		post_change_to_dictatorial = yes
	}
}

REPLACE:gov_crown_colony = {
	transfer_of_power = presidential_elective
	new_leader_on_reform_government = no

	male_ruler = "RULER_TITLE_GOVERNOR"
	female_ruler = "RULER_TITLE_GOVERNOR"

	possible = {
		has_law = law_type:law_colonial_administration
		exists = c:GBR
		is_subject_of = c:GBR
		c:GBR ?= {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		is_subject_type = subject_type_colony
		is_country_type = colonial
		top_overlord = { NOT = { is_country_type = colonial } }
		any_primary_culture = {
			has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_european
		}
		is_not_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_europe
		NOT = {
			c:BIC ?= this
		}
	}

	on_government_type_change = {
		change_to_presidential_elective = yes
	}
	on_post_government_type_change = {
		post_change_to_presidential_elective = yes
	}
}
